meaning: n.大人,阁下,有此荣衔神职者
examples: Monsignor Jaime Goncalves was also there.
The Monsignor turned his gaze from the flames to meet the Colonel's.
Monsignor Quinn, who was born in Newark in 1888, was assigned to the Brooklyn diocese shortly after his ordination.
Monsignor Stenico appeared on an investigative programme about gay priests on an Italian commercial TV channel, La7.
Monsignor France said the church had not decided what to do with the building yet.
